description_long: This is a large, ornate residential house set within a walled property, featuring a main building with multiple gabled and hipped roof sections, bay windows, and a grand front entrance. The property includes a tennis court, a swimming pool, a detached rotunda-like structure, and a landscaped area with several trees. The main house has two visible stories, with a prominent central section and symmetrical wings extending on either side. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with several bay windows and large glass panels. The entryway is grand, with a wide staircase, columns, and a covered porch. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, giving the house a stately and elegant appearance.
description: A grand, two-story residential house with bay windows, a tennis court, pool, and landscaped grounds, enclosed by a perimeter wall. The property features a prominent entryway, symmetrical wings, and a detached rotunda structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay windows, and the tennis court to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, trees, and the detached rotunda structure near the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the landscaped area with trees, and the pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, rotunda, and the rear of the main house.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand entry with wide steps, columns, covered porch, and decorative elements
